title: pelargonium × moreanum
intro: Pelargonium × moreanum, commonly known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and leaves with a rose-like scent. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × moreanum include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to support digestive health and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × moreanum often include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
